era: 1990-present (with hiatuses). Post-Grunge. E=6 -- melodic, radio-ready, commercially focused. Maverick/Warner.
associated_musicians: Mother Love Bone / Andrew Wood (Far Behind tribute)

theory_nodes.concept: 4 million copies on debut (1993). Post-Nevermind commercial wave. Most commercially successful post-grunge Seattle band.
theory_nodes.description: The Seattle sound's commercial ceiling in the post-grunge form.

theory_nodes.concept: Maverick Records enters engine: Madonna's label. Eclectic roster (Candlebox + Alanis Morissette). Unexpected but historically accurate.
theory_nodes.description: Madonna's label on the Seattle engine label map.

theory_nodes.concept: Far Behind as Andrew Wood tribute. Commercial form carries underground grief. 1990 origin (Wood's death) to 1993 mainstream (Candlebox).
theory_nodes.description: The Andrew Wood thread through the post-grunge commercial era.

cross_references.relationship: E=6 holds. Both formed 1989-1990, both major-label. Different aesthetics.
E=6 continues. Commercial post-grunge to Seattle supergroup depth.

sps_pair.pairing_note: Golden Eagle is rarer and more remote than Bald Eagle. Candlebox slightly removed from underground origins. Both impressive. E=6 match.
